problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
hypothesis: If Phytoremediation with hyperaccumulator plant species is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Life cycle assessment with 3 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The art of science is asking the right question, not answering. — Max Planck paraphrase
